# OnePerfectSlice Documentation

> OnePerfectSlice is a context-as-a-service platform for B2B GTM teams. It builds structured, evidence-backed context compiled from your data and delivers it to AI agents, workflows, and teams — so everyone can make smarter decisions, faster, with fewer hand-offs.

## Docs
- [Overview](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/quickstart)
- [Integrations](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/integrations/index)
- [Slices](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/product/slices)
- [Summaries](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/product/summaries)
- [Scorecards](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/product/scorecards)
- [Call Types](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/product/call-types)
- [Accounts Overview](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/accounts/overview)
- [Roles & Permissions](https://docs.oneperfectslice.ai/accounts/roles-and-permissions)
